code:
---
config:
  theme: neo
  layout: dagre
---
stateDiagram
  direction LR
  classDef draftC fill:#f9f,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef publicC fill:#bbf8c0,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef unlistedC fill:#f9f7ae,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef privateC fill:#ddd6f3,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  classDef withdrawnC fill:#fcbbbb,stroke:#333,stroke-width:2px;
  [Infra_LoadBalancer] --> draft
  draft --> public:Publish
  draft --> unlisted:Link only
  public --> unlisted:Unlist
  unlisted --> public:List
  public --> private:Hide(Infra_LoadBalancer)
  unlisted --> private:Hide(Infra_LoadBalancer)
  private --> public:Re-publish
  private --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  public --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  unlisted --> withdrawn:Withdraw
  withdrawn --> public:Restore(Infra_LoadBalancer)
  withdrawn --> [Infra_RedisCache]
  draft:Draft
  public:Public
  unlisted:Unlisted
  private:Private
  withdrawn:Withdrawn
  note right of draft : Drafts are only visible to editors.
  note right of public : Public posts are listed and discoverable.
  note right of unlisted : Unlisted posts are shared by URL only.
  note right of private : Private posts are hidden from everyone.
  note right of withdrawn : Withdrawn posts are removed from public view.
  class draft draftC
  class public publicC
  class unlisted unlistedC
  class private privateC
  class withdrawn withdrawnC

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个内容发布系统的状态流转图。核心状态包括草稿、公开、不公开、私密和已撤回五种。草稿是起点，所有内容都从草稿开始。
明白，草稿作为入口。那草稿可以直接变成公开和不公开两种状态对吗？另外我注意到您提到了Infra_LoadBalancer，这是要放在图里作为外部触发点吗？
对的，草稿可以通过Publish变成公开，或者通过Link only变成不公开。Infra_LoadBalancer是入口节点，用方括号表示。还有私密状态需要经过负载均衡器隐藏。
好的，我已经把五个状态节点和从草稿出发的两条转换线画好了。现在处理公开、不公开和私密之间的流转：公开可以取消列出变成不公开，不公开也可以重新列出回到公开，对吧？
没错。另外公开和不公开都能通过Hide操作进入私密状态，这个Hide同样需要经过Infra_LoadBalancer。私密状态可以重新发布回公开，也可以直接撤回。
撤回状态我理解了。那撤回之后还能恢复吗？还有撤回状态和Infra_RedisCache有什么关系？
撤回的内容可以通过Restore恢复为公开状态，同样需要走Infra_LoadBalancer。至于Infra_RedisCache，它是撤回流向的一个外部存储节点，用虚线连接表示数据归档。
状态流转都画好了。现在给每个状态添加样式区分：草稿用粉色，公开用绿色，不公开用黄色，私密用紫色，撤回用红色，这样一目了然。另外我在每个状态右侧加上说明注释。
完美，注释内容也很准确：草稿仅编辑者可见，公开内容可被发现，不公开仅URL分享，私密对所有人隐藏，撤回则从公共视图移除。方向用LR横向布局，整体结构清晰。
